E800

Plots for measurement point E800:

20251204_141433_STE-01_E800.csv (2025-12-04)

Code 
import sys, os
sys.path.append(os.path.abspath("src"))
from create_plots import load_csv, create_plotly_plot
import plotly.io as pio

csv_path = r"data/raw\20251204_141433_STE-01_E800.csv"
variable = "A Flow velocity [m/s]"

df = load_csv(csv_path)
fig = create_plotly_plot(df, variable, csv_path)

# Show interactive plot in HTML
pio.renderers.default = "notebook_connected"
fig.show()
